titles.title: Lamb of God I Worship You

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lamb of God I worship You For all You are and all You do, With Your blood You paid the price Become spotless sacrifice, So I could be made new lamb of God I worship You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We sing holy, holy, holy, Holy is the Lamb, That brought redemption story, And hopes to fallen man, Lamb of God i worship you.
